headline: Northern Trust Pension Universe Data: Flat Returns for Canadian Pension Plans in Q1 as Geopolitical Tensions Intensified
summary: TORONTO, May 04, 2026--The median pension plan in the Northern Trust Canada Universe returned a modest 0.4% in the first quarter of 2026.
